Morning Briefing: Regional Rail Update

The regional rail agency said overnight switch repairs finished ahead of schedule, allowing weekday service to return to normal frequencies on the Harbor Line. Riders should still expect brief platform changes at Central Station while crews complete signal testing.

Officials also confirmed that weekend bus bridges will continue through the end of the month on the Ridge segment. The agency recommends checking route alerts before departing, especially for early shifts when replacement buses may depart from alternate curb zones.

A final construction bulletin is expected Friday afternoon with updated timelines for elevator access improvements. Commuter advocates said clearer station signage has reduced confusion, but they continue to push for multilingual announcements at transfer hubs.
